dashboard.title: Добро пожаловать в HRI
dashboard.description: Ваша HR-панель с поддержкой ИИ. Начните с организационного аудита.

Legacy.AI-generated role profiles with responsi: Профили ролей, созданные ИИ, с обязанностями, компетенциями и KPI.
Legacy.Are onboarding processes documented and: Are onboarding processes documented and standardized?
Legacy.Are reporting lines (who reports to whom: Are reporting lines (who reports to whom) documented and communicated?
Legacy.Are standard operating procedures (SOPs): Are standard operating procedures (SOPs) documented for key workflows?
Legacy.Are there clear seniority levels or care: Are there clear seniority levels or career progression paths?
Legacy.Assess your organization's HR maturity a: Оцените HR-зрелость организации по 5 ключевым направлениям.
Legacy.Assess your organization's HR maturity i: Оцените HR-зрелость организации за минуты с помощью пошагового мастера.
Legacy.Define accountability for every process: Определите ответственность за каждый процесс и действие в организации.
Legacy.Do team members understand where their r: Do team members understand where their responsibilities start and end?
Legacy.Do you have written job descriptions for: Do you have written job descriptions for most roles?
Legacy.Do you use templates for recurring HR ta: Do you use templates for recurring HR tasks (offer letters, reviews, etc.)?
Legacy.Does every employee have a clearly defin: Does every employee have a clearly defined role title?
Legacy.Everything you need to structure your te: Все, что нужно для структурирования команды
Legacy.From audit to action — HRI guides you th: От аудита к действиям — HRI сопровождает вас на каждом шаге.
Legacy.Generate structured, professional job de: Создавайте структурированные профессиональные должностные инструкции с ИИ.
Legacy.HRI transforms unstructured organization: HRI превращает неструктурированные организации в понятные системы без необходимости HR-экспертизы. Проводите аудиты, создавайте должностные инструкции и распределяйте обязанности с ИИ.
Legacy.Is there an employee handbook or company: Is there an employee handbook or company policies document?
Legacy.Manage HR document templates — policies,: Управляйте шаблонами HR-документов: политиками, процедурами, чек-листами и формами.
Legacy.Manage your account, organization, and p: Управляйте учетной записью, организацией и настройками.
Legacy.Map roles and responsibilities with an i: Сопоставляйте роли и обязанности в интерактивном редакторе матриц.
Legacy.Name: Имя
Legacy.No defined levels or progression paths: No defined levels or progression paths
Legacy.No issues detected yet. Complete an audi: Проблем пока не обнаружено. Завершите аудит, чтобы найти области для улучшения.
Legacy.No, responsibilities are figured out on: No, responsibilities are figured out on the job
Legacy.Reporting lines exist but are not always: Reporting lines exist but are not always clear
Legacy.Run your first organizational audit to d: Запустите первый организационный аудит, чтобы узнать оценку HR-зрелости и получить практические рекомендации.
Legacy.Some levels exist but progression is unc: Some levels exist but progression is unclear
Legacy.Some roles are defined, others are infor: Some roles are defined, others are informal
Legacy.There is frequent overlap or confusion: There is frequent overlap or confusion
Legacy.Visualize your organizational progress a: Визуализируйте организационный прогресс и отслеживайте ключевые метрики.
Legacy.When someone is hired, do they receive a: When someone is hired, do they receive a list of specific responsibilities?
Legacy.Yes, all roles are clearly defined: Yes, all roles are clearly defined
Legacy.Yes, comprehensive and up to date: Yes, comprehensive and up to date
Legacy.Yes, every new hire gets a detailed job: Yes, every new hire gets a detailed job description
Legacy.Yes, for all or most roles: Yes, for all or most roles
Legacy.Yes, levels and progression are defined: Yes, levels and progression are defined
Legacy.Yes, there is a clear org chart: Yes, there is a clear org chart
Legacy.Yes, there is a structured onboarding pr: Yes, there is a structured onboarding process
Legacy.Your AI-powered HR intelligence dashboar: Ваша HR-панель с поддержкой ИИ. Начните с организационного аудита.
